name: Gegrillte Bratwurst (Grilled Bratwurst)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bratwursts, beer, onion, peppercorns, and cloves in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Drain excess liquid from the saucepan.
4. Grill the bratwursts over charcoal about 10 minutes, until browned.
5. Sprinkle water over the bratwursts to form a crisp skin.
6. Serve in hard rolls with Dusseldorf-style mustard.
